{% with base_url=request.scheme|add:"://"|add:request.get_host %}
# Gobii

> Gobii sources qualified candidates from a job description.

Gobii is built for recruiting teams that need qualified candidate shortlists without starting from a blank search tab. Users paste a job description, and Gobii agents source, research, qualify, and organize candidates for recruiter review.

Gobii solves one problem: enter a job description, get qualified candidates.

## Core Pages

- [Gobii homepage]({{ base_url }}/): Enter a job description and source qualified candidates.
- [Pricing]({{ base_url }}/pricing/): Self-serve pricing plans, including Pro and Scale.
- [Documentation](https://docs.gobii.ai/): Documentation for Gobii agents and integrations.
- [Full Context]({{ base_url }}/llms-full.txt): More detailed information for LLMs.

## Important Use Cases

- Recruiting and candidate sourcing
- Candidate profile research
- Candidate qualification against job requirements
- Shortlist organization for recruiter review
- Hiring pipeline exports and follow-up preparation

## Integrations

- Google Sheets
- Gmail
- Outlook / Microsoft 365
- Apollo
- Discord
- Hubspot
- LinkedIn
- Web browsing
- File uploads
- Remote MCP tools
- Many more - see [Integrations]({{ base_url }}/app/integrations) in your account for details.

## Product Positioning

Gobii is not a generic template directory or chatbot-only interface. It is a focused candidate sourcing product for turning job descriptions into qualified candidate shortlists.


## Candidate Sourcing

- Gobii recruiting agents are persistent digital workers that can search web sources, evaluate candidate profiles against recruiter-provided criteria, and deliver organized candidate research.
- Gobii candidate sourcing workflows can turn a role brief into a source-linked shortlist with fit notes, profile links, work-history context, and recruiter review notes.
- Recruiting workflows can export to Google Sheets, CSV, webhooks, and enterprise ATS integrations where configured.
- Gobii is best described as a candidate sourcing product for delegated recruiting workflows, not as a replacement for recruiter judgment or hiring compliance review.
